hooks.command: input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$fp" in */skills/*|*/CLAUDE.md|*/README.md) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; jq -n --arg p "$fp" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Self-check for "+$p+": For SKILL.md — name matches directory, description precise for trigger matching, body under 500 lines, L3 content (templates, examples, reference data) in references/ not inlined. For CLAUDE.md — every line passes the litmus test (would removing it worsen an architectural decision?). Layering: L1 stable/small, L2 on activation, L3 on demand.")}}'

input=$(cat); [ "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; t=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); [ -f "$t" ] || exit 0; files=$(jq -r 'select(.message?.content) | .message.content | if type=="array" then .[] | select(.type?=="tool_use" and (.name=="Edit" or .name=="Write" or .name=="NotebookEdit")) | .input.file_path // empty else empty end' "$t" 2>/dev/null | awk '/\/skills\/|\/CLAUDE\.md$|\/README\.md$/ {if (!seen[$0]++) print}' | tail -10 | paste -sd "," -); [ -n "$files" ] || exit 0; jq -n --arg f "$files" '{decision:"block",reason:("Before finishing — relevant files changed this session (up to 10 shown): " + $f + ". If any paths, names, terminology, or structure shifted, check that other files still reference them correctly.")}'
